name: Illy Cream
description: Illycrema is frozen coffee cream with 100% illy Arabica coffee, without added hydrogenated fats or colouring. It's a soft, fresh and velvety cream containing micro particles of ice.

name: Cappuccino

description: A frozen dessert made from fermented milk cultures, giving it a tangy flavor, and is considered a lighter alternative to ice cream due to its lower fat content.

description: A frozen dessert made from fermented milk cultures, giving it a tangy flavor, and is considered a lighter alternative to ice cream due to its lower fat content.

description: Smooth espresso combined with creamy white chocolate and chilled milk, served over ice for a sweet and refreshing treat.

name: Iced Mocha Latte
description: A delicious mix of espresso, rich chocolate, and chilled milk served over ice for a refreshing mocha delight.

name: Iced Matcha
description: Vibrant green matcha powder whisked into chilled milk, creating a smooth and refreshing antioxidant-rich drink.

name: Iced Latte

description: Slow-steeped coffee brewed cold for a smooth, rich, and less acidic flavor, served chilled.

description: Rich and full-bodied coffee brewed by steeping grounds in hot water, delivering a bold and aromatic cup.

name: American
description: Classic drip coffee with a smooth and mild flavor, perfect for a simple, satisfying cup.

name: White Mocha
description: Rich espresso blended with creamy white chocolate and steamed milk for a sweet and indulgent treat.

name: Matcha Latte

name: Hot Chocolate
description: Warm and velvety rich chocolate drink made with steamed milk, perfect for cozy moments.

name: Sledgehammer

name: BA Latte

name: Spanish Latte
description: old espresso combined with sweetened condensed milk and steamed milk for a creamy, sweet coffee delight.

name: Dark Mocha
description: Rich espresso blended with dark chocolate and steamed milk for a deep, intense chocolate-coffee flavor.

name: Coffeenut

name: Caramel Macchiato

name: Biscoff Latte

name: Cortado

name: Latte
